name: MikroTik CCR2116-12G-4S+
title: MikroTik CCR2116-12G-4S+ Router – High-Performance 16-Core Cloud Router
title_extended: MikroTik CCR2116-12G-4S+ Router – High-Performance 16-Core Cloud Router
short_description: Cloud Core Router, 16 cores, 4x 10G SFP+ ports, M.2 PCIe slot, 6x faster BGP Performance, dual-redundant power supply
description: Consolidating Networks with CCR. MikroTik's Cloud Core Router series, introduced in early 2023, represents a cutting-edge lineup of high-capacity routers designed to connect and consolidate small computer networks into a single large network. These routers offer powerful single-core performance, making them ideal for handling heavy operations with per-connection processing. The series features a range of models with various port configurations and redundant power supplies, catering to diverse networking needs for businesses, ISPs, research facilities, and more. With their advanced features and affordability, MikroTik's Cloud Core Routers are a reliable choice for taking networking setups to the next level.

detailed_description.heading: Consolidating Networks with CCR
detailed_description.text: MikroTik's Cloud Core Router series, introduced in early 2023, represents a cutting-edge lineup of high-capacity routers designed to connect and consolidate small computer networks into a single large network. These routers offer powerful single-core performance, making them ideal for handling heavy operations with per-connection processing. The series features a range of models with various port configurations and redundant power supplies, catering to diverse networking needs for businesses, ISPs, research facilities, and more. With their advanced features and affordability, MikroTik's Cloud Core Routers are a reliable choice for taking networking setups to the next level.

detailed_description.heading: Unleash Unmatched Performance
detailed_description.text: Elevate your networking setup with the MikroTik CCR2116-12G-4S+ router, designed to eliminate CPU limitations. Featuring the powerful Amazon Annapurna Labs Alpine CPU, this router sets a new standard of single-core performance in the entire CCR product family. With an impressive 16 cores running at 2 GHz, it boosts single-core performance by at least 15%, ensuring smooth and efficient operations.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Connectivity Options
detailed_description.text: Equipped with four 10G SFP+ ports and twelve Gigabit Ethernet ports, the CCR2116-12G-4S+ offers seamless connectivity and unparalleled flexibility. The SFP+ ports feature separate, full-duplex lines connected to the Marvell Aldrin family switch chip, while each group of four Gigabit Ethernet ports has a dedicated full-duplex connection to the switch chip. Additionally, a Gigabit port is directly connected to the CPU for effective management purposes, ensuring switch-like throughput in most setups without any bottlenecks.

detailed_description.heading: Ideal for Demanding Environments
detailed_description.text: Designed to meet the needs of large ISPs and handle dynamic routing, massive BGPs, complex firewall rules, and intricate quality of service configurations, the CCR2116-12G-4S+ is equipped with robust power and versatility. Its reliable 10G networking capabilities provide a solid foundation for handling heavy workloads seamlessly. With a dual-redundant power supply, the router ensures reliable and uninterrupted network connectivity, avoiding any unexpected downtime.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Compatible Design
detailed_description.text: Housed in a classic white 1U rackmount case, the CCR2116-12G-4S+ blends seamlessly into your existing network infrastructure. With 16 GB RAM and 128 MB storage memory, this router efficiently handles advanced configurations and updates, ensuring smooth and stable operation at all times. It is also compatible with 1 x CCR2004-1G-2XS-PCIe, enabling easy installation into the router for enhanced functionality.
